sections.paragraph:
αἴλουρος, ου, ὁ, ἡ (since Hdt. 2, 66 [αἰέλουρος]) cat (Hdt., Aristot., Diod S 20, 58, 2; Ptolem., Apotel. 3, 9, 2 κυνῶν ἢ αἰλούρων; Aelian; Plut., Mor. 144c; Cyranides p. 59, 13 αἴ. ἤτοι κάττα; EpJer 21) PtK 2 p. 14, 19.—DELG s.v. αἰέλουρος.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Ptolem Ptolem , math., II a.d.—List 5

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Cyranides Cyranides , a compilation relating to magical properties of stones, plants, and animals; perh. antedating I/II a.d.—List 5

PtK PtK = Petruskerygma (Preaching of Peter)—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 26
